articles.title: Gates Foundation Captured NIH Research Priorities Through Massive Donations, Whistleblower Reveals
articles.summary: Former NIH official exposes how Bill Gates used hundreds of millions in donations to steer agency research priorities toward Gates Foundation interests. The whistleblower allegations reveal direct corruption of federal health research through philanthropic capture.

articles.title: FDA Commissioner Admits Agency 'Cover-Up' of Child Deaths From COVID Shots
articles.summary: Internal documents reveal the FDA investigated reports of children dying after COVID vaccination while publicly denying safety concerns. Commissioner Makary's admission exposes years of deliberate suppression of pediatric death data.

articles.title: Medical Schools Deliberately Hide Vaccine Injury Recognition From Pediatricians
articles.summary: Investigation reveals medical education systematically omits training on vaccine adverse events while prioritizing compliance messaging. Pediatricians graduate unprepared to identify vaccine injuries, creating institutional blindness to harm.

articles.title: Ultra-Processed Food Giants Deploy Big Tobacco's Suppression Playbook
articles.summary: American Journal of Public Health study documents how processed food companies copied tobacco industry tactics to hide health harms and block public warnings. The research exposes deliberate suppression of nutrition science through industry manipulation.

articles.title: Canada Opens Floodgates for Vaccine-Injured to Testify as Compensation Schemes Crumble
articles.summary: MP Dean Allison launches citizen inquiry into vaccine injuries as UK and Canadian compensation programs face criticism for systematic denial of claims. Government accountability structures finally crack under mounting evidence.

articles.title: Senator Johnson Demands Medical Recognition of COVID Shot Injuries Trump Ignored
articles.summary: Ron Johnson calls for ICD classification of COVID vaccine injuries, stating 'these are not vaccines' but gene therapy. His transparency push challenges both medical establishment denial and political cover-ups.

articles.title: Chlorine Dioxide: The COVID Treatment Buried Before Ivermectin Hit Headlines
articles.summary: Investigation reveals systematic suppression of chlorine dioxide research for COVID treatment preceding the ivermectin controversy. Medical authorities buried evidence of another early treatment option to protect vaccine rollout.

articles.title: HHS Quietly Asks Public What Actually Works for Addiction After Decades of Failed Policy
articles.summary: With 80,000 annual opioid deaths, HHS finally solicits public comment on effective addiction treatments outside establishment protocols. The request admits systemic failure of current approaches while opening door to suppressed alternatives.

articles.title: Gates Used $430 Million to Capture NIH Research Agenda — Leaked Documents Expose Systematic Takeover
articles.summary: Leaked internal documents reveal Bill Gates funneled over $430 million to the NIH to directly control research priorities, with NIH Director Francis Collins personally coordinating Gates' visits and agenda. The billionaire philanthropist systematically steered federal medical research to benefit his foundation's investments while taxpayers funded the corruption.

articles.title: NIH Whistleblower: Gates Foundation Rigged Federal Research Priorities with Hundred-Million Dollar Bribes
articles.summary: Former NIH official blows whistle on Gates Foundation's systematic capture of federal research agenda through massive donations. The scheme allowed Gates to steer taxpayer-funded medical research toward projects that directly benefited his foundation's portfolio while masquerading as philanthropy.

articles.title: Canada Finally Allows Vaccine-Injured to Testify as Compensation Schemes Exposed as Sham
articles.summary: Canadian MP Dean Allison launches citizen inquiry into vaccine injuries after government compensation schemes rejected the vast majority of claims. UK and Canadian programs designed to silence victims through bureaucratic obstruction rather than provide genuine support for the vaccine-damaged.

articles.title: FDA's Child Death Cover-Up: Agency Hid COVID Vaccine Fatalities in Minors
articles.summary: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary admitted the agency investigated child deaths following COVID-19 vaccination but buried the findings. Internal documents reveal systematic suppression of pediatric vaccine fatality data while pushing shots on healthy children who faced near-zero COVID risk.

articles.title: OpenAI Whistleblower Found Dead Under Suspicious Circumstances — 'Execution Angle' Evidence Emerges
articles.summary: Suchir Balaji, who exposed OpenAI's illegal training methods for ChatGPT, found dead in circumstances forensic experts say resemble execution rather than suicide. Police rushed to rule it suicide while ignoring evidence that contradicts their predetermined conclusion — another whistleblower silenced.

articles.title: Medical Schools Deliberately Hide Vaccine Injury Recognition from Future Pediatricians
articles.summary: Medical education systematically omits training on vaccine injury recognition while drilling students on injection schedules and parent coercion tactics. Pediatricians graduate unable to diagnose vaccine damage because medical schools prioritize pharmaceutical profits over patient safety.

articles.title: Ultra-Processed Food Giants Deploy Big Tobacco's Deception Playbook to Hook Consumers
articles.summary: American Journal of Public Health study documents how ultra-processed food industry copied Big Tobacco's production, marketing, and suppression tactics to protect market share. Food corporations systematically deployed addiction science while blocking public health warnings about their products.

articles.title: Senator Johnson Demands Trump Recognize COVID Vaccine Injuries as Official Medical Condition
articles.summary: Ron Johnson calls for International Classification of Diseases code for COVID-19 vaccine injuries, forcing medical establishment to acknowledge what they've spent years denying. The senator demands transparency and accountability after years of gaslighting the vaccine-injured.

articles.title: Gates Foundation Caught Red-Handed: $430M to Corrupt NIH Research Priorities
articles.summary: Leaked documents reveal Bill Gates spent over $430 million to directly influence NIH research priorities, with Director Francis Collins personally meeting Gates to coordinate funding strategies. This systematic capture of America's premier medical research institution represents unprecedented private control over public health policy.

articles.title: Whistleblower Exposes Gates' NIH Money Machine: Private Foundation Controls Public Research
articles.summary: Former NIH official breaks silence on how Bill Gates weaponized hundreds of millions in donations to steer research priorities benefiting his foundation. The Gates-NIH nexus represents the complete privatization of public health research by unelected billionaires.

articles.title: FDA's Child Death Cover-Up: Agency Hides COVID Vaccine Fatalities in Minors
articles.summary: Commissioner Marty Makary admits FDA investigated child deaths following COVID vaccination but buried the findings. The agency's systematic concealment of pediatric vaccine deaths represents criminal negligence in protecting America's children.

articles.title: Medical Schools' Vaccine Injury Blindness: Doctors Trained to Ignore Harm
articles.summary: Medical education systematically excludes training on vaccine injury recognition, leaving pediatricians unable to identify harm. Schools prioritize vaccine promotion over safety assessment, creating a generation of doctors blind to iatrogenic damage.

articles.title: Big Food Deploys Big Tobacco's Playbook: Ultra-Processed Industry's Deception Exposed
articles.summary: New study documents how ultra-processed food manufacturers copied Big Tobacco's production and marketing tactics to block public health warnings. The food industry's systematic deception mirrors tobacco's decades-long campaign to hide health dangers.

articles.title: Senator Demands Truth on COVID Shot Injuries: 'These Are Gene Therapies, Not Vaccines'
articles.summary: U.S. Senator challenges medical establishment's denial of mRNA injection injuries, demanding official disease classification. The lawmaker exposes how COVID shots were reclassified from gene therapy to escape proper safety oversight.

articles.title: Canada Opens Floodgates: Vaccine-Injured Citizens Finally Get Platform to Testify
articles.summary: MP Dean Allison launches citizen inquiry into vaccine injuries as compensation schemes face criticism for systematic denial. Canadian government forced to acknowledge vaccine harm after years of suppression and gaslighting injured citizens.

articles.title: OpenAI Whistleblower's 'Suicide' Questioned: Death Scene Photos Suggest 'Execution Angle'
articles.summary: Tech whistleblower Suchir Balaji found dead after exposing OpenAI's ChatGPT training methods, with forensic evidence contradicting suicide ruling. His parents insist murder as disturbing death scene photos raise questions about silencing AI industry critics.

articles.title: Gates Foundation Secretly Steered $430 Million Through NIH to Control Medical Research Agenda
articles.summary: Leaked documents reveal Bill Gates funneled over $430 million to the NIH, with Director Francis Collins personally coordinating meetings to align research priorities with Gates Foundation interests. The billionaire philanthropist effectively captured America's premier medical research institution, steering taxpayer-funded studies toward his private agenda.

articles.title: NIH Whistleblower Exposes How Gates Used Donations to Hijack Federal Research Priorities
articles.summary: A former NIH official has blown the whistle on Bill Gates using hundreds of millions in donations to manipulate the agency's research agenda. The systematic capture of America's medical research apparatus by private billionaire interests represents unprecedented corruption of public health institutions.

articles.title: FDA Caught Covering Up Child Deaths from COVID Vaccines
articles.summary: Internal documents reveal the FDA's systematic cover-up of child deaths following COVID-19 vaccination, with Commissioner Makary forced to publicly acknowledge investigations only after mounting pressure. The agency buried evidence of pediatric fatalities to protect the vaccine narrative.

articles.title: Canadian MP Forces Government Inquiry into Vaccine Injuries After Years of Denial
articles.summary: MP Dean Allison launches citizen-led inquiry into COVID vaccine injuries as compensation schemes in Canada and UK face criticism for rejecting the vast majority of claims. Government finally forced to acknowledge what they spent years suppressing—widespread vaccine harm.

articles.title: U.S. Senator Demands Disease Classification for COVID Shot Injuries: 'These Are Gene Therapies'
articles.summary: A sitting U.S. Senator publicly declares COVID injections are gene therapy, not vaccines, while demanding official disease classification for injection injuries. The admission that 'these injection injuries are real' represents a major crack in the official narrative.

articles.title: Medical Schools Deliberately Fail to Train Doctors in Recognizing Vaccine Injuries
articles.summary: Investigation reveals pediatricians receive virtually no training in identifying vaccine injuries, instead being indoctrinated to push shots and overcome 'vaccine hesitancy.' The systematic educational gap ensures doctors remain blind to the harms they're causing children.
